name: Butterscotch Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice and apples; toss until well coated.
3. Stir in sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt; mix well.
4. Turn into 9-inch unbaked pie shell. Cover edges with aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
6. Toppings: Melt over hot (not boiling water) Nestle Butterscotch Flavored Morsels and butter; stir until smooth.
7. Remove from heat; stir in flour and salt. Blend until mixture forms large crumbs.
8. Remove foil from pie. Crumb mixture over top of hot apples.
9. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes longer.
